name: io.github.adelaidasofia/instagram-mcp
description: Official, multi-account Instagram Graph API MCP: read, publish, analytics, comments, DMs.

environmentVariables.name: INSTAGRAM_MCP_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Long-lived Graph API token (optional; or use add_account at runtime, stored in OS keychain).

environmentVariables.name: INSTAGRAM_MCP_IG_USER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Numeric Instagram Business/Creator account id paired with the access token.
